review_title: Overall a great AD management suite.
description: Use to clean up AD and get various reports out. Some of the GPO reports and the ability to search a GPO value save hours in troubleshooting.
author: Peter B.
pros: AD automation for stale objects and great reporting enabling admins to clean up OUs, objects and so much more.
cons: Sometimes there are bugs or glitches experienced, but Manage Engine support are quick and very helpful.

review_title: Powerful alternative to scripting, reporting, and task automation
description: It provides an easier interface for advanced reporting and management of Active Directory and 365 objects - whilst navigating can be cumbersome initially, once you've been through and used the common modules a few times it all starts to fall into place.
author: Connor Q.
pros: ADManager provides a visual interface for advanced reporting and AD actions through a web console - a lot of functions that might otherwise require some scripting competency and delegating administrative and access rights to users that you mightn't otherwise allow in more secure environments. It combines the functionality of active directory, 365 and powershell modules for AD and task scheduler to achieve advanced reporting & management from a central, easy to navigate place - also allowing for delegation and distribution of admin rights across certain groups/OUs without having to expose underlying infrastructure and services to regional administrators or more technical users, ensuring that everything stays secure and within compliancy rulesets.
cons: Some functions can be difficult to find and might require searching through sub-menu's. The product also provides an SMTP reporting/notification feature which can leave a lot to be desired. The in built reporting function produces legible and customisable excel sheets/PDFs however this functionality doesn't seem to exist in the same vein when dealing with the email notifications and as such trying to backtrack through these notifications to understand what takes may or may not have run successfully can be quite difficult, especially if like us you have configured many automated jobs to run each night and end up with a bulk set of emails to try and digest the following morning.

review_title: Streamlined AD Management for IT Teams
description: very practical tool for managing AD. It reduces the manual work involved in IT tasks and makes it easier to stay compliant with reporting.
author: Julio H.
pros: The built-in reports are a big help for compliance and audits, saving time on manual tracking.
cons: The interface can feel a bit outdated at times,and some advanced features require extra configuration, which can take a while to set up.

review_title: Review on ManageEngine ADManager Plus
description: My experience with ManageEngine ADManager Plus has been largely positive. The platform significantly simplifies Active Directory management by offering a clean, intuitive interface and powerful automation features. Tasks that previously required PowerShell scripting—like bulk user creation, group assignments, and reporting—can now be done quickly with just a few clicks. This has improved efficiency and reduced dependency on senior IT staff
author: Lance F.
pros: ManageEngine ADManager Plus is User-Friendly Interface, Bulk User Management and we delegate tasks to helpdesk technicians without giving full admin rights.
cons: Performance Lag with Large AD Environments, Limited Cloud-Only AD Support and services may require more time and training.

review_title: Ad manager Admin user
description: Using Ad manager has really simplified the active directory management process by enabling bulk user management, automation capabilities, delegation and accountability within the IT team. It has really helped in time saving and reducing the operational control gradually.
author: Gregory K.
pros: i really have great time when using ManageEngine Ad manager since it has a very interactive interface and powerful automation features that streamline the Active directory management tasks. The ability to handle bulk user operations, Automate user deactivation and activations, generate reports that help in compliance and auditing. It also integrates with ms365 and hybrid environments effectively.
cons: In a large environment which has a lot of Ad object count, Ad manager is always slow to load. Also a detailed documentation would help especially during integrations with hybrid and ms365 environments.

review_title: Exceeds expectations in simplifying the management of users in AD
author: Ahmed E.
pros: I liked the automation of the user provisioning for ADManager Plus while performing the onboarding activities. It also eliminated hours of work of duplicating templates and copying group members and passwords and policies to all sites in the domain.
cons: I observed a problem of not very speedy real-time modifications particularly with the membership of groups in dynamic contexts.

review_title: Satisfied Customer
description: My overall experience with ManageEngine AdManager Plus was extremely pleasant. I am a very satisfied customer and will remain one for the foreseeable future.
author: Mark H.
pros: Amazing customer service and features. Easily able to navigate the dashboard and site. The setup process for first device made it effortless for all others.
cons: The only "con" I am able to come up with for ManageEngine AdManager Plus is the pure amount of features. There are so many options that for a novice it could be overwhelming.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Transformed our way of handling users in the organization
author: Mohamed M.
pros: The ability to implement several features and options available with ADManager Plus, especially the Access Certification Campaign, proved to be a major boon for our company. It has enabled us to schedule groups for the periodic review of user access rights regarding internal policies and external requirements such as GDPR.
cons: When implementing our solution, we encountered some issues with the integration of some tools into the HR system due to weak support of the API. It made it necessary to use manual methods in syncing user data, which was quite tedious to perform.

review_title: Efficient patterning in order to manage IT workflows
author: Tiffany V.
pros: ADManager Plus delegation features were helpful in the ability to assign specific administrative chores to the help desk technicians but with less power. Through carefully setting rights at a granular level only the necessary accesses were afforded to technicians for instance, password resets and account access unlocks.
cons: While setting up the delegations, there were certain procedural complexities especially in defining the roles.

review_title: Reliable AD management Tool
description: Password resetting is streamlined, its cost-effective solution I can recommend that Reporting module is perfect one .
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: First of all, IU is user friendly and role-based access is awesome feature, this bulk user management, modification is super using csv files.
cons: few options to work with other third-party vendors, UI feel old one, roles of you chose it is not having feature to update dynamically
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Review on ManageEngine ADManager plus
description: We have been using ManageEngine ADManager plus in our organization for almost 2 years now and our overall experience is positive. The interface is user-friendly, the setup and configuration is straightforward this make it very easy to navigate.
author: Emily R.
pros: It streamelined identity management cycle, ADManager plus allow our company to manage the entire user life cycle, from provisioning to deprovisioning, making it easier to unboard and offboard employees.
cons: It has limited customisation options. Apart from this everything works fine.

review_title: Improve the security via keeping detailed records of access
author: Esther A.
pros: The features that gave ADManager Plus a competitive edge included Access Certification Campaign for periodic checks on user access. This made sure that the permission given to every user was consistent with their job requirement and therefore limit access to unauthorized personnel.
cons: There was one area that required enhancement, and this was flexible reporting. Special requests for certain types of reports and analyses took extra time sometimes which caused the inclusion of a few data sets that were not in the reports as preferred.​

review_title: Great for newcomers to AD, for veterans it may not be needed.
description: A nice alternative to standard active directory
author: Daniel T.
pros: The Dashboard and user interface is very clear, with all the information you need easily accessible.
cons: If you already use active directory, you can do the task without needing this software.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Amazing MDM solution!
description: It helps me test my MDM solutions very efficiently and guarantees that it will work for other customers
author: Christian J.
pros: Very simple to setup, works with both iOS and Android. It helped explain to me what certificates were needed for iOS.
cons: No complains, very impressed. I would say that maybe some extra tutorial or walk through steps could be helpful but overall easy to read through.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Recommend it
author: Vicky G.
pros: Easy to use, user friendly, and the page is clear
cons: little bit too slow to adopt, have to learn it.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: To simplify the administration of your domain, ADManager is the best solution
description: ADManager has helped the company to improve the administration of the domain, allowing to improve times and through personalized templates
author: Andrés S.
pros: It is very simple and easy to implement, it also allows the management, loading and updating of bulk data.
cons: The solution is very cheap compared to its scope

review_title: Excellent reporting and compliance on Active Directory
author: Michael F.
pros: The ease of generating reporting on Active Directory for compliance purposes
cons: Does require more operational maintenance than a SaaS solution

review_title: AD manager Plus is one of the best product to maintain your daily AD Tasks
description: This one product all administrators should have to make their daily ad task easy and save more time
author: faizhal K.
pros: complex reporting and task are made very easy with Ad manager plus and it is one of the product helping me a lot with daily tasks.
cons: Regular updates should be provided to make it fully utilized and more reporting options should be provided

review_title: Advance platform for GDPR compliance
author: Zeynep K.
pros: ManageEngine ADManager Plus is one of the most comprehensive platform for GDPR compliance requirements.
cons: Our experience so far with ManageEngine ADManager Plus is absolutely positive, no negative aspects to note here.

review_title: My experience with your customer support folks is always very positive.
author: marcus M.
pros: By far the automation of new accounts and reports are invaluable. We have saved countless hours and ROI with the automation and reporting modules.
cons: I wish there was a way to migrate accounts to "O365". Currently, I use your application to create my account on-premise with email through your automation, but there is no way to successfully migrate to "O365".

review_title: Active Directory Management Made Easy
description: Currently utilizing AdManager to manage AD for a company of 100+ employees.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to install and setup Vast amounts of data entry options for your users
cons: User interface looks a bit dated compared to ManageEngine's other offerings.

review_title: Dhruba Das provided excellent service to Rosendin
author: Hong Z.
pros: Really appreciate tech support's time, efforts and expertise. This software is able to provide technicians to work on active directory, email, Skype for business, reports and many other options.

review_title: First class support and an easy to use UI
description: Short learning curve to take advantage of most of the features as well as quick deployment.
author: Eric E.
pros: ROI is quick, and the support is easy to get to, not hidden like some companies. You can get to help from right inside some of the products.
cons: The only bad thing is they do not make more products for us to enjoy like the half dozen we already have!

review_title: AD Managerplus makes life by automating Active directory tasks with simple interface
description: AD management has been a cake walk with all reporting automated.
author: RENFORD JOSEPH R.
pros: Active directory left untouched , automate and streamline AD tasks with little scripting knowledge, simple user interface
cons: AD managerplus is heading the right direction with feature being added on a regular basis , i have absolutely no hiccups thus far in my usage .
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: No issues getting new user creation template set up since the support tech handled everything
author: Chad F.
pros: Very flexible yet powerful. Thank you for all the Azure and O365 tie-ins. Don't stop helping the on premise or hybrid users.
cons: No DirSync but was told it is coming. AD Delegation is a little clunky to figure out.
